vulnerabilities.justification: Server Actions used in trading dashboard. Host header not sanitized at edge.
PreferQueryMode=SIMPLE used in risk engine for performance. SQL injection confirmed in staging.
Alpine-based containers do not include vulnerable xz-utils version. Verified via SBOM.
UriComponentsBuilder used in OAuth2 callback handler for trading SSO.
Authorization bypass potential. Security team assessing if requestMatchers patterns are affected.
gRPC used for Spanner connections. HTTP/2 Rapid Reset could disrupt trading during peak hours.
GKE autopilot mode with hardened containerd runtime. AWS EKS uses patched 1.7.14.
Payment channel TLS uses OpenSSL via cryptography library. PKCS12 used for client certs.
Legacy settlement service fully migrated to Spring Boot. No Apache Struts in codebase.
Netty HTTP header validation bypass affects gRPC gateway. Could enable request smuggling.
